claims.evidence_text: The maximum measured evapotranspiration rate for wheat was 9.9 mm day -1 and for maize was 10 mm day -1.
claims.claim_summary: Maximum measured daily crop evapotranspiration rate for wheat was 9.9 mm/day in a semi-arid region (Fars, Iran).

claims.evidence_text: The single crop coefficient ( K c ) values for the initial, mid-, and end-season growth stages ... of wheat were 0.77, 1.35, and 0.26, respectively.
claims.claim_summary: Single crop coefficient (Kc) for wheat at the initial growth stage was 0.77 (locally measured, semi-arid Iran).

claims.evidence_text: The single crop coefficient ( K c ) values for the initial, mid-, and end-season growth stages ... of wheat were 0.77, 1.35, and 0.26, respectively.
claims.claim_summary: Single crop coefficient (Kc) for wheat at the mid-season growth stage was 1.35 (locally measured, semi-arid Iran).

claims.evidence_text: The single crop coefficient ( K c ) values for the initial, mid-, and end-season growth stages ... of wheat were 0.77, 1.35, and 0.26, respectively.
claims.claim_summary: Single crop coefficient (Kc) for wheat at the end-season growth stage was 0.26 (locally measured, semi-arid Iran).

claims.evidence_text: The K cb values for the initial, mid-, and end-season growth stages were 0.23, 1.14, and 0.13 for wheat and 0.10, 1.07, and 0.06 for maize, respectively.
claims.claim_summary: Basal crop coefficient (Kcb) for wheat at the initial growth stage was 0.23 (locally measured, semi-arid Iran).
